subject: Version change
commit_message:
Version change

- resources version reverted to prev version
- schema-service release version updated
- update aai-common release version
- update maven deploy plugin version

Issue-ID: AAI-4207
Change-Id: Ia9ac97c8ccf9f737a2ead89542f8f7ae5f777883
Signed-off-by: akshay.khairnar@t-systems.com <akshay.khairnar@t-systems.com>

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-resources-master-verify-java/749/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-resources-master-verify-java/749/ )

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.aai.aai-common:aai-core:jar:1.17.0-SNAPSHOT needed for sub-project org.onap.aai.resources:aai-resources:jar:1.17.0-SNAPSHOT: The following artifacts could not be resolved: org.onap.aai.aai-common:aai-core:jar:1.17.0-SNAPSHOT, org.onap.aai.aai-common:aai-schema-ingest:jar:1.17.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/aai-resources-master-verify-java/750/ )
